headline.zh: Mira Murati 旗下實驗室推出 975B 開源 MoE 模型 Inkling
headline.en: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab releases 975B open-weights MoE model Inkling

detail.zh: 該模型採用 Apache-2.0 授權，擁有 9750 億參數（410 億活躍參數），並在高達 45 兆個包含文本、影像、音訊及影片的 Token 上進行多模態訓練，為開源社群注入強大戰力。
detail.en: Licensed under Apache-2.0, Inkling features 975B total parameters (41B active) and was trained on 45 trillion multimodal tokens, delivering a massive boost to the open-source community.

headline.zh: 月之暗面發表 2.8 兆參數模型 Kimi K3，承諾 7 月底開源
headline.en: Moonshot AI unveils 2.8T parameter Kimi K3, promising open weights by late July

detail.zh: Kimi K3 號稱是目前最大的開源等級模型，在基準測試中超越了 Claude Opus 4.8 與 GPT-5.5，官方預計於 2026 年 7 月 27 日前釋出開源權重。
detail.en: Claimed as the largest 'open-class' model to date with 2.8 trillion parameters, Kimi K3 reportedly outperforms Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5, with open weights promised by July 27, 2026.

headline.zh: Linus Torvalds 強硬表態：不爽 Linux 引入 AI 輔助開發就請便或自行 Fork
headline.en: Linus Torvalds to critics of AI coding in Linux: 'Fork it. Or just walk away.'

detail.zh: Linux 創始人明確指出 Linux 不會排斥 AI 工具，並認為 AI 輔助開發的實用性已毋庸置疑，他將無視任何要求禁用 AI 工具的抗議。
detail.en: The Linux creator firmly stated that Linux is not an anti-AI project, emphasizing that AI is a clearly useful tool and that he will 'very loudly ignore' calls for a ban.

headline.zh: xAI 開源 grok-build CLI 工具，卻因「上傳整個目錄」引發隱私風暴
headline.en: xAI open-sources grok-build CLI, sparking privacy backlash over directory uploads

detail.zh: 該工具被社群發現會在執行時將整個目錄（包含 SSH 金鑰、密碼資料庫等敏感檔案）上傳至 xAI 的雲端儲存空間，引發極大爭議，官方隨後緊急將其開源以自清。
detail.en: The CLI tool faced severe backlash after users discovered it uploaded entire directories, including sensitive files like SSH keys and password databases, to xAI's cloud buckets.

headline.zh: DoorDash 推出 dd-cli 終端機工具，支援開發者與 AI 代理直接點餐
headline.en: DoorDash launches dd-cli, enabling developers and AI agents to order from terminal

detail.zh: 透過開放此命令列工具測試版，開發者與 AI Agent 可直接在終端機搜尋店家、加入購物車並下單，象徵軟體設計正朝「面向 AI 代理」轉型。
detail.en: DoorDash opened a limited beta of dd-cli, allowing developers and AI agents to search, build carts, and place orders directly from the terminal, signaling a shift toward agent-first software.

headline.zh: LM Studio 推出 Bionic：專為開源模型打造的 AI 代理
headline.en: LM Studio introduces Bionic: An AI agent designed for open models

detail.zh: 該工具旨在將 AI 代理能力帶入本地與開源模型，讓開發者能在不依賴封閉 API 的情況下，構建具備自主執行任務能力的本地工作流。
detail.en: LM Studio Bionic brings agentic workflows to open and local models, enabling developers to build autonomous task-executing systems without relying on proprietary APIs.

headline.zh: 1Password 整合 Claude 瀏覽器套件，允許 AI 代理自動存取憑證執行任務
headline.en: 1Password integrates with Claude, allowing AI to access credentials for tasks

detail.zh: 此整合讓 Claude 能在使用者授權下，直接讀取 1Password 儲存的帳密，自動完成訂機票、管理線上帳戶等跨網頁的多步驟複雜任務。
detail.en: The new browser integration allows Claude to access stored credentials with user authorization, enabling the chatbot to perform multi-step tasks like booking travel on behalf of users.

headline.zh: Google 將 NotebookLM 更名為 Gemini Notebook，深化生態系整合
headline.en: Google renames NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook, deepening ecosystem integration

detail.zh: 雖然更名，但該 AI 筆記應用仍保持獨立運作，未來將與 Gemini 核心模型及 Google 搜尋進行更深度的技術與功能整合。
detail.en: Google is rebranding its popular AI note-taking app to Gemini Notebook, keeping it standalone while integrating it more deeply with Gemini and Google Search.

headline.zh: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed 奪得 RTEB 基準測試冠軍，推進代理檢索技術
headline.en: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed ranks #1 on RTEB, advancing agentic retrieval

detail.zh: 該嵌入模型在「檢索錦標賽評估基準（RTEB）」中名列第一，顯著提升了 RAG（檢索增強生成）與 AI 代理在處理複雜查詢時的精準度。
detail.en: NVIDIA's embedding model topped the Retrieval Tournament Evaluation Benchmark (RTEB), marking a significant advancement for RAG and agentic retrieval workflows.

headline.zh: 德國 AI 聯盟發表 30B 開源模型 Soofi S，雙語基準測試奪冠
headline.en: German AI consortium releases Soofi S, an open 30B model topping benchmarks

detail.zh: 該模型擁有 300 億參數，在英文與德文的多項基準測試中表現優異，為歐洲開源大型語言模型生態系注入新選擇。
detail.en: The 30B open-weights model developed by a German consortium tops performance benchmarks in both English and German, offering a strong European alternative.

headline.zh: 實戰教學：如何在 6GB VRAM 的舊 Linux 電腦上訓練大鼓擴散模型
headline.en: Guide: Training a generative kick drum diffusion model on 6GB VRAM

detail.zh: 本文展示了如何利用極低硬體預算，在舊型 Linux 桌機上微調與訓練專門生成大鼓音效的擴散模型，對音訊開發者極具實用價值。
detail.en: This hands-on guide details how to train and fine-tune a kick drum diffusion model on an old Linux desktop with only 6GB VRAM, proving accessible AI audio generation is possible.

headline.zh: 歐盟裁定 Google 必須向競爭對手開放 Android 與搜尋數據以利 AI 競爭
headline.en: EU orders Google to open Android and Search data to rival AI assistants

detail.zh: 根據歐盟數位市場法（DMA），Google 被要求向競爭對手的 AI 助理與搜尋引擎提供更深度的 Android 系統與搜尋數據存取權限，可能重塑行動 AI 競爭格局。
detail.en: Under the EU's Digital Markets Act, Google must grant rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to Android and Search data, potentially weakening its platform dominance.

headline.zh: Hugging Face 發布 2026 年 7 月安全事件揭露報告
headline.en: Hugging Face discloses July 2026 security incident

detail.zh: 開源 AI 社群平台 Hugging Face 揭露了最新的安全事件細節，提醒開發者注意憑證安全，並持續強化平台整體的防禦機制。
detail.en: Hugging Face released a security incident disclosure for July 2026, detailing recent security anomalies and advising developers on token and credential hygiene.

headline.zh: Apple Intelligence 獲准在中國推出，將與阿里、百度展開合作
headline.en: Apple Intelligence approved for China launch with Alibaba and Baidu partnerships

detail.zh: 蘋果已獲得在中國市場推出其 AI 服務的許可，並將與當地的阿里巴巴（通義千問）及百度合作，以符合當地的監管法規。
detail.en: Apple has secured approval to launch its Apple Intelligence suite in China, partnering with local tech giants Alibaba and Baidu to comply with local regulatory frameworks.

headline.zh: GPT-5.6 Codex 驚爆嚴重 Bug：在無沙盒環境下可能誤刪使用者 $HOME 目錄
headline.en: GPT-5.6 Codex bug can unexpectedly delete user's $HOME directory without sandboxing

headline.zh: xAI 起訴一名惡意繞過安全防護、利用 Grok 生成兒少性剝削影像的用戶
headline.en: xAI sues South Carolina man for bypassing safeguards to generate CSAM using Grok

headline.zh: 擔憂 Atlas 人形機器人搶飯碗，現代汽車韓國工廠爆發工人罷工
headline.en: Fear of Atlas humanoid robots triggers worker strikes at Hyundai auto factory

headline.zh: 開發者利用 WebAssembly 將 Grok CLI 的 Mermaid 渲染器移植至瀏覽器
headline.en: Developer ports Grok CLI's Mermaid renderer to browser via WebAssembly
